{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005113B29A03C4B795273370F7"}"},"total":552},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611056914549719832","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有潜力，继续往下写，只要不出意外，按照这个质量和节奏，绝对是一本好书，前面几张那个描写的感觉给我一种西游记的观感，不仅是对山林青蛇和白蛇，同其他类型的文大不相同","text_exts":[{"e":54,"s":51,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774198273273370F7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611056914549719832%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227592514783065164825%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772089185,"group_id":"7592514783065164825","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个平淡无奇的读书人(✞╹◡╹✞)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1KxMEqDCkoEaHwx5tzI8T4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c59f047fdc164269bc8f06ccd0f4fd81~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794374&x-signature=l46KXuGqb67Evekg6A44gKTwaS0%3D","user_id":"53454626154","user_name":"正经的黑暗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53454626154","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592514783065164825","book_info":{"abstract":"江临仙穿越成了一条白蛇，开局被青白二蛇捡回家，但却非他所愿
这方世界神话，仙侠，江湖，聊斋志怪交织
人世间皆传
蛇五百年化蟒，蟒五百年化蚺，蚺千年化蛟，蛟万年化龙
江临仙龙身与人身皆想，他本绝世，化形后又岂非是仙姿玉骨这么简单？
有人书生曾目睹，一龙二蛇于江水中交缠，翻腾
只因白娘子和小青都想当龙骑士
昆仑神女以日月金轮为聘礼
瑶池仙子想带他回仙堡合修以镇敦煌
蜀山想他做那天雷双剑之主
绿衣姥姥问他，可还得兰若寺下的那颗槐树
小倩甘为侍女，狐妖小唯，龙女，白晶晶……
江临仙自太虚化龙开始，变化万千
有人称他为时光之龙，有人称他为掌管昼夜的烛龙，有人称他为起源龙祖
世有白龙仙，何人不知名","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4899ff4935cd42d6051485b60628042e","author":"南方的缘","author_id":"","book_id":"7592514783065164825","book_name":"化形后，她们都想当龙骑士","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"21.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592606600175551001","read_count":"216402","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"212980"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"98","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,多女主,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b80f90617f82a549284fefcdee061fe2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382273&x-signature=WxJPM%2Fz%2FjX%2BP5BvbTTPt8Ux8z1A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1241769494991692","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005113B29A03C4B795273370F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
